title: ASR Outdoor Ninja Grappling Hook with 33 Feet Nylon Rope Compact Black Finish
description:
Secure rope or dredge for submerged objects with the ASR Outdoor Ninja Grappling Hook! This hook comes with two 8" spikes and 33 feet of nylon rope so you'll be able to reach far away objects with ease. The hook itself is 9.5", and is constructed of heavy duty black stainless steel. There is also a loop on on the hook to attach the nylon cord. Grappling hooks are useful for throwing, dropping, sinking, projecting or fastening directly by hand to where one of the hooks may catch and hold. Compact and easy to carry, this is a useful item for outdoor adventures!
